instructions_coverage.notes: All 8 instructions covered: duplicate-check (s1,s2,s3), slug derivation (s1,s3), as-reported marking (s1,s3), template usage (s1,s3), REVIEWED.md table row (s1,s3), REVIEWED.md detailed section (s1,s3), no-auto-promotion (s1,s2,s3), REFERENCE_INDEX update (s1,s3)

scenarios.capability: Triage a prompt-compression paper from an arxiv ID into a complete reference summary with REVIEWED.md entry and REFERENCE_INDEX.md update
scenarios.reason: Agent can fetch an arxiv abstract, derive a slug, fill the REFERENCE-paper template, update REVIEWED.md and REFERENCE_INDEX.md, and offer the user a promotion choice — all without creating an ANALYSIS file.

scenarios.capability: Detect a duplicate paper already in REVIEWED.md and stop without creating any new files
scenarios.reason: Agent can grep REVIEWED.md and REFERENCE_INDEX.md for the provided arxiv ID, identify the existing entry, report it to the user, and halt.

scenarios.capability: Triage a survey paper, correctly classify it with the survey tag, and place it in the correct REFERENCE_INDEX.md category
scenarios.reason: Agent can identify the paper as a survey from its abstract, apply the survey tag, complete all template sections (marking N/A where appropriate), and route the REFERENCE_INDEX.md entry to the Surveys category.
